ideation: This animation sequence aims to depict a family scene with two children. The adult will have their arms open in a welcoming gesture while each child will have one arm reaching towards the adult.  The sequence will emphasize the warmth and connection within the family. To achieve this, I will use a combination of joint1 and joint2 movements to create natural-looking arm poses. The adult's arms will be slightly curved to create a more inviting posture, while the children's arms will be extended towards the adult. This demonstrates the closeness and affection within the family unit.  The sequence will progress from a neutral starting position to a full embrace, capturing the essence of family connection. The transition between frames will focus on gradual, natural movements to avoid sudden, robotic-like actions.

frames.beat: adult's arms open wide, children reach out
arms extend further, a warm family embrace begins
the family is together, arms wrapped in love
